llm_context.content: Imagine you are helping software test engineers to create comprehensive test plans without delving i...

actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour id 1090992649 in scene references script guid 376688c5b82056e4da4c2b159887a7dc (ToggleLight). Serialized isOn=0, so Light should start disabled by Start(). No m_Calls UnityEvent entries present. The GameObject does not list Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger; please confirm a Collider/EventTrigger exists or allow direct method invocation for testing. This step turns the light ON.
Verify ToggleLight can disable the Light after being on. Requires same conditions as previous action regarding interaction eligibility.
Flip should toggle from current state (expected off) to on.
Flip again should toggle back to off, confirming both paths of the boolean toggle.
